root.m_Talk_ENG: What did you tell Esther?

root.m_Talk_FRA: What did you tell Esther?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my! So you two finally met? That's great!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh my! So you two finally met? That's great!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh my! So you two finally met? That's great!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...* Forget it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...* Forget it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...* Forget it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just tell me what happened. All of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Every last detail. And don't leave anything out.
